extraction.one_line_summary: CARAPAZ attacked 3km from summit of Lago Serrù, dropped GC group by 1:47, taking maglia rosa from ROGLIČ.
tactical_patterns: CARAPAZ attacked precisely when LOPEZ forced pace exhaustion, exploiting CARUSO's tempo work that distanced LANDA from ROGLIČ group.
Mitchelton-Scott's twin breakaway strategy with HAMILTON and JUUL-JENSEN forced ROGLIČ into isolated defensive riding without team support early.
YATES bridged alone after LÓPEZ's accelerations shattered GC group, gaining 1:30 on ROGLIČ while they watched each other.
NIBALI attacked immediately on first climb approach with ROGLIČ marking, revealing shark won't allow gaps even when isolated tactically.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: timed summit attack when CARUSO finished pulling and favorites hesitated, showing superior tactical awareness and climbing form
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: negative: completely isolated by kilometer one despite holding rosa, forced to chase every move personally without team
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: recovered from apparent difficulty to attack alone while favorites marked each other, gaining 1:30 on ROGLIČ group
rider_signals.LÓPEZ Miguel Ángel: neutral: multiple accelerations shattered GC group but lacked finishing power when CARAPAZ countered his pace-making
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: distanced from ROGLIČ group during early LÓPEZ accelerations, couldn't follow when Movistar teammate CARAPAZ attacked
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: attacked aggressively first kilometer despite isolated position, contested bonus seconds at finish showing competitive instinct
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: paced until 3km to summit setting up CARAPAZ's winning move, perfect super-domestique execution
rider_signals.AMADOR Andrey: positive: second consecutive day in breakaway revealing aggressive Movistar strategy to pressure GC group early
